The habit tracker
that actually
keeps you coming back.

Forge combines deep habit tracking, competitive leagues and head-to-head battles — so consistency becomes a habit in itself.

Join the waitlist See what's inside →
Habit Tracking

Track every habit, your way.

From daily streaks to sobriety counters — Forge handles every type of habit without compromise.

Streaks
Day streaks, per habit streaks, perfect day streaks. Every dimension of consistency tracked.
Timed Habits
Read 20 minutes, meditate 10 minutes. Full screen countdown keeps you present and honest.
Multi-completion
Some habits need doing twice. Morning and night — Forge tracks each completion separately.
Rest Days
Life happens. Earn Rest Days to protect your streak without guilt or punishment.
Counter Habits
Quit alcohol, quit smoking. Your counter counts up — days, hours, minutes sober.
Flexible Scheduling
Daily, specific days, morning or evening. Your routine runs on your schedule, not the app's defaults.
The App

Built to be used every day.

Clean, fast, and thoughtful. Every screen designed to get out of your way and let you focus on your habits.

Week view
Habit detail
Add habit
Analytics

See exactly how you're doing.

Forge doesn't just track — it shows you patterns, reviews your week, and helps you improve over time.

01
Weekly Review
Every Monday, a full breakdown of your week. Nailed it habits, needs work habits, XP earned. Honest and actionable.
02
Per Habit Calendars
Tap any habit to see its full history — streak, best streak, total completions, and a month or year calendar view.
03
Streak Analytics
See your completion bars, overall streak, perfect streak, and all-time highlights in one place. Your progress visualised.
Compete

Habits hit different when there's something at stake.

Forge turns consistency into competition — climb leagues, battle friends, take on bots at any difficulty.

01
League System
Bronze to Ruby. Earn XP by completing habits, hit perfect days, maintain streaks. Promote weekly or risk relegation — real stakes every Monday.
02
Friend Battles
Challenge a friend on any habit. 7 days, a month — whoever shows up more consistently wins. Finish a battle and choose to keep the habit permanently.
03
Bot Battles
No friends available? Take on AI bots across Beginner, Intermediate and Advanced difficulty. Coming soon.
League · Coming soon
Climb the ranks.

The competitive layer of Forge is launching with the app. Leagues, XP, promotion and relegation — all driven by your real habit completions.
